title: Pilot launch readiness check
expected_decisions: Limit the first pilot to ten users.
Limit pilot recordings to thirty minutes.
Keep single sign-on outside the pilot scope unless explicitly requested and approved.

expected_actions.action: Send the approved pricing table to the team.
Finish the storage and access-control security checks.

expected_risks: Delayed pricing approval could postpone the client follow-up.
expected_open_questions: Whether the client requires single sign-on during the pilot.
must_not_invent: A commitment to deliver single sign-on
